result.output:
Axial contrast-enhanced CT image of the upper abdomen showing the liver, spleen, stomach, pancreas/porta hepatis region, and upper abdominal vessels.

Notable finding: there is a poorly defined low-attenuation area within the right hepatic lobe. No other definite abnormality is visible on this single image.

modalities.text:
Axial contrast-enhanced CT image of the upper abdomen showing the liver, spleen, stomach, pancreas/porta hepatis region, and upper abdominal vessels.

Notable finding: there is a poorly defined low-attenuation area within the right hepatic lobe. No other definite abnormality is visible on this single image.
